name: Ballistic Shield
effect: +1 Defense while in cover. Can be used for Shield Strike attacks.

name: Kevlar Vest
effect: Standard light protection +1 Def. No movement penalty.

name: Tactical Plate Carrier
effect: +1 Defense. Standard issue for frontline operators.

name: Combat Bike
effect: High mobility scouting vehicle. Increases Wounds (Chassis) and Movement.

name: Night Vision Goggles
effect: Allows the fighter to ignore range penalties from 'Low Light' rules.

name: Stims / Adrenaline
effect: One use only. Heal 1d3 wounds or remove a Stun effect.

name: Laser Sight
effect: Increase the BS of a weapon when fired at a target between 3 and 8.

name: Comm-Link / Radio
effect: Fighter may use the Leadership or Ability of a friendly officer within 12".

name: Breaching Charges
effect: Destroys a section of wall or door. Targets within 1" take damage.
